visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair wearing a vibrant lime green t-shirt stands in a modern, brightly lit indoor living room. He starts by holding a blue facial mask packet towards the camera. The scene then cuts rapidly through several snippets where he holds different beauty items like a pink compact, points at his nose, and displays a fan of cash, all while central white and yellow text overlays flash on screen. (2) The man transitions to presenting a large white bottle of Dr. FORHAIR shampoo and its boxed packaging on a wooden table. He gestures enthusiastically, pointing at the bottle and then at his own hair. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the clean white plastic of the product containers and the neutral colors of the home background. (3) A close-up shot shows a hand pressing the pump of the shampoo bottle, dispensing a thick, white, opaque liquid into a palm. This is followed by a shot of the man in a shower setting with tiled walls, vigorously massaging a thick white lather into his hair with both hands. His facial expressions are animated and energetic. (4) The camera cuts to the man drying his hair with a white Panasonic hairdryer in a bathroom setting. He runs his fingers through his now dry hair, which appears voluminous. Close-up shots of his scalp and hair follicles are shown to demonstrate cleanliness. Finally, he returns to the living room setting, holding the product and pointing at the camera to deliver a final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting products throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with short, styled brown hair, wearing a bright lime green t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist apartment interior with a white couch, wooden table, and neutral-colored walls. The bathroom features beige tiles and a metal shower shelf.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, rapid-fire male voice asking rhetorical questions in a bright, excited tone. A fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat plays continuously. Sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effects are synchronized with every visual cut, occurring almost every second during the opening sequence. (2) As the speaker begins a more detailed explanation of the product, the BGM remains steady. Audible 'click' and 'squish' sounds denote the shampoo pump being activated and the liquid being dispensed. The speaker's articulation is clear and sharp, maintaining a high level of vocal arousal and positive valence throughout the presentation. (3) A noticeable broadband 'whooshing' sound from a hairdryer is heard for a short segment, accompanied by the rustling sound of fingers moving through hair. The speaker's voice returns with heightened enthusiasm for the results, concluding with a final resonant 'ding' sound effect that punctuates the call to action as the music continues to play out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Product Introduction -> Usage Demo -> Result Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell Dr. FORHAIR shampoo by demonstrating its effectiveness against scalp aging and hair loss, highlighting its availability at Costco Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, verbal recommendation, and Costco purchase information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy influencer-led advertisement utilizing social media editing tropes to engage viewers quickly.
